creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #20)
No, you are not. That's why we have a separate ccache4 port: it has a lot of build dependencies.

For now (until poudriere is changed to handle it) I disable ccache in poudriere config, run poudriere bulk ... devel/ccache4 and enable it again to workaround cyclic deps. poudriere still produces lots of warnings, but works
